languages.text: "Он сказал, что вы собираетесь отключить платформу от Движущей Силы и уничтожить рабочих станции. Это не похоже на поведение праведных технослужителей".
"He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: "Он сказал, что вы собираетесь отключить платформу от Движущей Силы и уничтожить рабочих станции. Это не похоже на поведение праведных технослужителей".

traits.locale_text: "He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."
"He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."
"He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: 「彼は、貴方が動力源からプラットフォームを切断し、駅員を解雇すると述べていた。それは、オムニシアの正義のしもべの行動とは思えないね」
languages.original_text: "He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は、貴方が動力源からプラットフォームを切断し、駅員を解雇すると述べていました。それは、オムニシアの正義のしもべの行動とは思えませんね。」

languages.text: «Dijo que iba a desconectar la plataforma de la Fuerza Motriz y eliminar a los trabajadores de la estación. Eso no parece ser la labor de los fieles siervos del Omnissiah».
languages.original_text: "He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: «Dijo que iba a desconectar la plataforma de la Fuerza Motriz y eliminar a los trabajadores de la estación. Eso no parece ser la labor de los fieles siervos del Omnissiah».

languages.text: “他说你们要切断平台的源力连接，并清除星站的工人。这听着可不像是欧姆尼赛亚的正直仆从该有的行为。”
languages.original_text: "He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: “他说你们要切断平台的源力连接，并清除星站的工人。这听着可不像是欧姆尼赛亚的正直仆从该有的行为。”

languages.text: "Er sagte, Ihr würdet die Plattform von der Antriebskraft trennen und die Arbeiter der Station töten. Das klingt nicht nach dem Verhalten einer rechtschaffenen Dienerin des Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: "He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Er sagte, Ihr würdet die Plattform von der Antriebskraft trennen und die Arbeiter der Station töten. Das klingt nicht nach dem Verhalten einer rechtschaffenen Dienerin des Omnissiah."

languages.text: "Platformun Devinim Gücü ile bağlantısını keseceğinizi ve istasyon işçilerini ortadan kaldıracağınızı söyledi. Bu, Hermesih'in salih hizmetkârlarının davranışına benzemiyor."
languages.original_text: "He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Platformun Devinim Gücü ile bağlantısını keseceğinizi ve istasyon işçilerini ortadan kaldıracağınızı söyledi. Bu, Hermesih'in salih hizmetkârlarının davranışına benzemiyor."

languages.text: « Il a dit que vous alliez déconnecter la plateforme de la Force Motrice et éliminer les ouvriers de la station. Ce qui est parfaitement contraire à ce qu'on attendrait de fidèles serviteurs de l'Omnimessie. »
languages.original_text: "He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: « Il a dit que vous alliez déconnecter la plateforme de la Force Motrice et éliminer les ouvriers de la station. Ce qui est parfaitement contraire à ce qu'on attendrait de fidèles serviteurs de l'Omnimessie. »
